VistaShares Marks the One-Year Anniversary of its Artificial Intelligence Supercycle ETF (AIS)
Wealthy investors tap ETFs for three hot assets, according to Goldman Sachs
VistaShares Introduces the VistaShares Target 15™ Berkshire Select Income ETF
AI-themed ETFs plunge in wake of DeepSeek news
VistaShares Launches its First ETF, Providing Pure Exposure™ to the Artificial Intelligence Supercycle™

holdings.infoBox: AIS is an equity ETF with a total of 63 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 10.77%, Micron Technology at 8.03%, Advanced Micro Devices at 4.63%, Marvell Technology at 4.45%, and Vertiv Holdings Co at 3.60%.

overview.description: The VistaShares Artificial Intelligence Supercycle ETF (AIS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, using an underlying index to identify and weight global AI companies in an investment portfolio. Companies may span in size, selection is based on thematic relevance and liquidity. AIS was launched on Oct 1, 2024 and is issued by VistaShares.

data.title: VistaShares Launches its First ETF, Providing Pure Exposure™ to the Artificial Intelligence Supercycle™
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO & BOSTON & NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VistaShares and its visionary leadership team have launched their first ETF: the VistaShares Artificial Intelligence Supercycle ETF (AIS).
